query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gpsTracking` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `shipmentId` int NOT NULL,
  `driverId` int NOT NULL,
  `latitude` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `longitude` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `speed` varchar(10),
  `heading` varchar(10),
  `accuracy` varchar(10),
  `timestamp` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `gpsTracking_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `transportationCompanies` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int,
  `companyName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `businessLicenseNumber` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `dotNumber` varchar(100),
  `mcNumber` varchar(100),
  `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `address` text NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `state` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `zipCode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `insuranceProvider` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `insurancePolicyNumber` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `insuranceCoverage` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('active','inactive','suspended','pending_approval') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending_approval',
  `verified` enum('yes','no') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'no',
  `totalDrivers` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalDeliveries` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `rating` varchar(5),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `transportationCompanies_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aN4XovBvgLTwiy.root --database jWmfVYBaikHBYpPLbpiijG --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gpsTracking` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `shipmentId` int NOT NULL,
  `driverId` int NOT NULL,
  `latitude` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `longitude` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `speed` varchar(10),
  `heading` varchar(10),
  `accuracy` varchar(10),
  `timestamp` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `gpsTracking_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `transportationCompanies` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int,
  `companyName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `businessLicenseNumber` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `dotNumber` varchar(100),
  `mcNumber` varchar(100),
  `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `address` text NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `state` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `zipCode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `insuranceProvider` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `insurancePolicyNumber` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `insuranceCoverage` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('active','inactive','suspended','pending_approval') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending_approval',
  `verified` enum('yes','no') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'no',
  `totalDrivers` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalDeliveries` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `rating` varchar(5),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `transportationCompanies_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
